sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id UInt32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmap, UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_bitmap SET bitmap_col = bitmapUnion(bitmap_col, bitmapBuild([50,60,70])) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bitmapToArray(subBitmap(bitmap_col, toUInt32(5), toUInt32(10))) AS res FROM test_bitmap WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bitmapToArray(subBitmap(bitmap_col, toUInt32(0), toUInt32(5))) AS res FROM test_bitmap WHERE id = 1;
